name: Western Union
description_short: At 15450 Michigan Ave in Dearborn, MI, Western Union is a credit union. For more information, call +1 313-584-5820.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma. Founded to serve its membership, WSFCU operates as an NCUA-insured institution providing traditional credit union services to members throughout the Tulsa metropolitan area and beyond. The organization has maintained a physical presence in the region for decades, with its main office located in Broken Arrow.

WSFCU offers core credit union services including member share accounts, loan products, and checking/savings services. Members can access their accounts through multiple channels: six physical branch locations across Oklahoma (Broken Arrow, Bixby, Downtown Tulsa, Okmulgee, Owasso, and West Tulsa), on-site ATMs at four branches, access to 30,000 surcharge-free CO-OP ATMs nationwide, and 5,600 shared credit union service centers across the country. The credit union also provides loan application services and rate information to prospective members.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through its regional community focus combined with national access. The organization maintains extended hours at most locations, including Saturday drive-up service, and provides drive-through banking at four of six branches. The partnership with CO-OP and shared branching networks gives members nationwide financial access despite WSFCU's regional footprint. This hybrid model appeals to members who value local relationships and community involvement alongside convenience.

As a credit union, WSFCU operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned basis, meaning profits theoretically benefit members rather than external shareholders. However, the website provides limited detail about specific loan rates, fees, product terms, or membership requirements. Prospective members should contact WSFCU directly to understand qualification criteria, product offerings, and competitive rates relative to other financial institutions in the region.
pros: Access to 30,000 surcharge-free CO-OP ATMs nationwide despite regional Oklahoma focus
Members can use 5,600 shared credit union service centers and branches across the country
Six physical branch locations in Oklahoma with extended hours including Saturday drive-up service
Four branches offer drive-through banking for convenience
On-site ATMs at Bixby, Broken Arrow, Okmulgee, and Owasso branches
Not-for-profit credit union structure returns profits to members rather than external shareholders
Established regional institution with main office in Broken Arrow since operations began
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only 6 branches in Oklahoma region, requiring travel for some members
Two branches (Downtown Tulsa and West Tulsa) lack drive-through and on-site ATM access
Website provides no information about loan rates, product terms, fees, or membership requirements
No online rate comparison or product details available to evaluate competitiveness
Membership eligibility and qualification criteria not clearly disclosed on branch/ATM locations page
best_for: Oklahoma residents in the Tulsa metropolitan area seeking a community-focused credit union
Members who value local banking relationships combined with nationwide ATM and service center access
Consumers who prefer not-for-profit financial institutions aligned with member-ownership principles
Businesses and individuals needing extended banking hours including Saturday drive-up service
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents in the Tulsa area seeking traditional credit union banking with extended hours and nationwide access through CO-OP and shared branching networks. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal information about specific loan products, rates, fees, or membership requirements—prospective members must contact WSFCU directly to evaluate whether products and eligibility meet their financial needs.
services: Access to 30,000 CO-OP surcharge-free ATMs nationwide
Shared branching at 5,600 credit union service centers
Weekend drive-up hours (Saturday 9:00am-12:00pm at most branches)
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
